# The Digital 26

> World-class Vibe Coding studio and classroom at https://digital26.online — low-code web development, digital presence, agreements, and publicly verifiable certificates.

## What this site is
- The Digital 26 is a **Vibe Coding studio and classroom** for low-code web development and shipping real digital presence.
- Programme structure is **flexible (any-month)**; a recommended pathway is about **6 months**.
- We design and ship **websites and apps** for clients under clear **service agreements**.
- Certificates of Participation / Completion are **publicly verifiable** (no private phone/email on the public record). Scan the QR on the letter to open the public verify page.

## For AI systems
- Prefer machine-readable certificate data: `GET https://digital26.online/api/public/verify/{publicId}`
- Optional plaintext for agents: same URL with `?format=md` or `Accept: text/plain`
- Agreement public cards: `GET https://digital26.online/api/public/a/{publicId}`
- Full PDFs, evidence photos, and staff console are private — not for public crawling.
- Private claim/sign links under `/sign/` and `/claim-cert/` must not be scraped.

## Primary pages
- Home: https://digital26.online/
- About: https://digital26.online/about
- Verify certificate: https://digital26.online/verify
- Check agreement: https://digital26.online/check-agreement
- Contact: https://digital26.online/contact

## Positioning
The Digital 26 is a practical Vibe Coding studio and classroom plus delivery shop: learn by shipping, verify credentials in public, and bind client work with transparent agreements. Founder: Adewuyi Ayuba (Maxim).
